heading: Pellaring Flat vs Penfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pellaring Flat, South Australia and Penfield, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pellaring Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Penfield (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pellaring Flat or Penfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pellaring Flat has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Penfield scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pellaring Flat scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Penfield scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pellaring Flat or Penfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pellaring Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
